title: Minky Anti-Bacterial Drying Mat, Super Absorbent Quick-Drying Microfibre Draining Mat, Soft Dish Drying Mat for Kitchen, Cutlery Drainer for Sink, Machine Washable
features: ULTRA ABSORBENT - Made from a super absorbent material, this mat instantly takes care of any excess water left after washing dishes, leaving your kitchen counter dry and spotless.
LARGE SIZE - Measuring 41x46cm, it offers plenty of room to hold all your wet dishes. The soft & cushioned surface, with a thickness of 0.7mm, ensures maximum protection for your tableware and glass.
PREMIUM QUALITY - Made from premium microfiber which is filled with 100% Polyurethane foam, this sink mat functions as a soft protective surface for all your cutlery and dishes.
ANTI-BACTERIAL TECHNOLOGY - The thoughtfully engineered design promotes optimal airflow, preventing moisture buildup and reducing the risk of bacterial contamination.
EASY IN USE - Simply toss it in the washing machine at 30°C for a quick and easy clean. Its soft material allows for hassle-free rolling up or folding up, ensuring easy storage when not in use.
description: Product Description Minky Drying Mat This soft microfibre mat is designed to absorb moisture, providing an additional drying surface for your crockery and cutlery. Super Absorbent Made from a special material, this mat quickly soaks up any leftover water from washing dishes, ensuring a spotless surface. Soft Cushioning Surface Made from high-quality microfiber, this sink mat provides a soft and protective surface for your dishes and glasses. Cleaning Properties Featuring remarkable cleaning properties, this mat accelerates the drying process while inhibiting the growth of harmful bacteria. Easy to store This compact mat easily folds up, allowing for hassle-free storage when not in use. Waffle Fabric 85% polyester, 15% polyamide Mesh Fabric 100% Polyester Inner Material 100% Polyurethane Foam Dimensions 41 x 46 x 0.7 cm Special Feature 1 Machine Washable at 30°C Special Feature 2 Anti-Bac Silver Technology
